name: Max Starcke Park Tennis Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Max Starcke Park Tennis Courts in Seguin, TX! There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Amenities include lights. The courts are free.

name: Schertz YMCA
description: Come play pickleball at Schertz YMCA in Schertz, TX! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights. The courts can be reserved.

name: Seguin-Saegert Pickleball Complex
description: Additional courts located at Phase II will be completed in fall/winter 2023
